title: PRE→SDE handoff record (prd-entry)
description: Single JSONL record appended to .scratch/handoff.jsonl by product-requirements-expert. Carries the structured feature scope that system-design-expert needs to begin design work without re-deriving acceptance criteria, file targets, or test names. Conservative required-field set; grow on observed retry deltas, not upfront speculation.

type.description: Discriminator. Always "prd-entry" for this record type.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the record was appended.

author.description: Agent that authored the record. Pinned to PRE for this record type.

title.description: Short requirement title (matches the heading in docs/prd.md).

summary.description: One- or two-sentence statement of what the feature does. No implementation details.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable conditions that define done. Each entry is one criterion in plain prose.

file_targets.description: Paths likely to be created or modified. Best-effort — SDE may add or remove paths during design. At least one entry required so SDE has a starting point.

test_names.description: Go test functions expected to exist when the feature is complete. Pattern matches Go test naming (^Test[A-Z]…). At least one required so the implementer's TDD cycle has a concrete first target.

non_goals.description: Explicit out-of-scope items. Optional; include when scope boundaries are non-obvious.

dependencies.description: Other requirement IDs this entry depends on. Optional.

notes.description: Free-form context that doesn't fit other fields. Optional. Avoid as a dumping ground — if a structured field would fit, propose it.
